channel.title: Notes on Sambit's Knowledge Maps
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Sambit's Knowledge Maps

item.title: Types of Complexity Across Domains
item.description: A pluralistic overview of complexity—how it shows up in code, minds, systems, societies, and knowledge—and concrete methods for taming each.

item.title: Zettelkasten Principles
item.description: Core principles and practices of the Zettelkasten method for knowledge management.
